fields.name: messageId
fields.description: Unique identifier for this message exchange

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Date and time when the message was created

fields.name: source
fields.description: Originating system that sent the message

fields.name: messageType
fields.description: Classification of the message content and intent

fields.name: priority
fields.description: Urgency level for processing this message

fields.name: action
fields.description: The specific action to be taken on the account

fields.name: account
fields.description: Core account identification and classification details

children.name: accountNumber
children.description: The account identifier in IBAN format

children.name: accountHolder
children.description: Name of the individual or entity that owns the account

children.name: accountType
children.description: Classification of the account product

children.name: currency
children.description: The currency in which the account is denominated

children.name: branch
children.description: The branch location where the account is held

fields.name: freezeDetails
fields.description: Detailed information about the freeze action and its justification

children.name: freezeType
children.description: The scope of the freeze applied to the account

children.name: reason
children.description: The compliance or risk reason triggering the freeze

children.name: description
children.description: Detailed narrative explanation of the freeze rationale and supporting evidence

children.name: initiatedBy
children.description: Name of the person who initiated the freeze action

children.name: department
children.description: The department within risk_and_compliance that initiated the freeze

children.name: effectiveFrom
children.description: The date and time when the freeze becomes effective

fields.name: restrictions
fields.description: Granular transaction and activity restrictions applied to the frozen account

children.name: allowIncomingTransfers
children.description: Whether incoming wire transfers and electronic payments are permitted

children.name: allowOutgoingTransfers
children.description: Whether outgoing wire transfers and electronic payments are permitted

children.name: allowWithdrawals
children.description: Whether cash withdrawals are permitted

children.name: allowCardTransactions
children.description: Whether debit or credit card transactions are permitted

children.name: allowCheques
children.description: Whether cheque issuance and clearing are permitted

fields.name: escalation
fields.description: Escalation and approval workflow information for the freeze action

children.name: level
children.description: The escalation level within the approval hierarchy

children.name: requiresApproval
children.description: Whether the freeze action requires formal approval before implementation

children.name: approvalDeadline
children.description: The deadline by which approval must be obtained

children.name: complianceOfficer
children.description: Name of the compliance officer responsible for approving the freeze

fields.name: additionalInfo
fields.description: Supplementary information including case tracking, risk assessment, and notification status

children.name: caseReference
children.description: Unique identifier for the associated compliance or fraud investigation case

children.name: riskScore
children.description: Quantified risk assessment score on a scale indicating fraud or compliance risk severity

children.name: customerNotificationSent
children.description: Whether the account holder has been notified of the freeze action

children.name: regulatoryReporting
children.description: Whether this freeze action requires reporting to regulatory authorities
